choose.when: ORDER BY s.recommend_score DESC, f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT f.id AS favoriteId, s.id AS spotId, s.city_id AS cityId, c.city_name AS cityName, s.spot_name AS name, s.spot_type AS type, s.lng AS lng, s.lat AS lat, s.address AS address, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.summary AS summary, s.recommend_reason AS recommendReason, s.opening_hours AS openingHours, s.ticket_info AS ticketInfo, s.suggested_duration AS suggestedDurationMinutes, s.best_time AS bestTime, s.recommend_score AS recommendScore, s.hot_score AS hotScore, s.is_free AS isFree, s.is_indoor AS isIndoor, s.is_night AS isNight, s.is_rainy_day AS isRainyDay, s.subway_friendly AS subwayFriendly, s.first_visit AS firstVisit, f.created_at AS favoritedAt FROM user_favorite_spot f INNER JOIN spot s ON f.spot_id = s.id LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_favorite_spot f INNER JOIN spot s ON f.spot_id = s.id LEFT JOIN city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE
